sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 42g. saturated fat is a real drawback here. for meats, fat quality is one of the main tie-breakers after protein.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 42g. saturated fat is a real drawback here. for meats, fat quality is one of the main tie-breakers after protein.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 1.4g. carbs do not matter much here. meats usually live or die on protein quality and what comes with the fat.

sections.narration: protein is 37g. the protein quality is strong. for meats, strong protein is expected, so the rest decides how high it climbs.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 20% DV, vitamin d at 2% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the food very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: zinc at 15% DV, iron at 3% DV stand out most. the mineral support is still pretty limited overall.

sections.narration: biggest pros. highly palatable and appealing because a real-world reason people love it. works as a strong flavour booster because useful in meals even in smaller amounts. has strong comfort-food appeal because popular and instantly legible for content packaging.
